claim_boundary: Repository evidence supports rehydration and coding continuity. It is not autonomous authority, not a proof of correctness, and not a production safety or security claim.
name: Nexus process rehydration manifest
process_spine: expand untracked directories with --untracked-files=all before residue checks
tracked_report_rule: Do not Remove-Item tracked reports. Restore reports, git clean untracked reports, then restore reports again.
untracked_directory_rule: Use git status --short --untracked-files=all before pre-stage residue gates so intended files do not collapse into directory-only summaries.
